records.question: Which Belgian Grand Prix races held in Belgium at latitude 50.9894 and longitude at least 5.25694 took place in year 1973 or later and were round 5 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE races.year >= 1973 AND races.name = 'Belgian Grand Prix' AND circuits.lng >= 5.25694 AND races.round >= 5 AND circuits.lat = 50.9894 AND circuits.country = 'Belgium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.country = 'Belgium'
  AND circuits.lat = 50.9894
  AND circuits.lng >= 5.25694
  AND races.year >= 1973
  AND races.round >= 5
  AND races.name LIKE '%Belgian Grand Prix%'

records.question: Which races held at Suzuka Circuit, with the URL http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suzuka_Circuit, had qualifying times exactly 1:32.875 in Q1 and 1:32.093 in Q2 and took place in 2013 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE circuits.name = 'Suzuka Circuit' AND qualifying.q1 = '1:32.875' AND races.year <= 2013 AND circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suzuka_Circuit' AND qualifying.q2 = '1:32.093'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceId = qualifying.raceId
WHERE circuits.url = 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suzuka_Circuit'
  AND races.year <= 2013
  AND qualifying.q1 = '1:32.875'
  AND qualifying.q2 = '1:32.093'

records.question: Which races are the Belgian Grand Prix held in round 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE races.round = 11 AND races.name = 'Belgian Grand Prix'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
WHERE name = 'Belgian Grand Prix' AND round = 11

records.question: Which races took place at the French Grand Prix in the year 2000?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
WHERE races.name = 'French Grand Prix' AND races.year = 2000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
WHERE races.year = 2000 AND races.name = 'French Grand Prix'

records.question: What races named exactly Moroccan Grand Prix took place on 1958-10-19 in year 1958 or earlier with a round number of at least 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
WHERE races.year <= 1958 AND races.date = '1958-10-19' AND races.name = 'Moroccan Grand Prix' AND races.round >= 11
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
WHERE name = 'Moroccan Grand Prix'
  AND date = '1958-10-19'
  AND year <= 1958
  AND round >= 11

records.question: Which races took place on 1986-10-26 at the Adelaide Street Circuit located in Adelaide with a longitude of at most 138.617?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.location = 'Adelaide' AND races.date = '1986-10-26' AND circuits.name = 'Adelaide Street Circuit' AND circuits.lng <= 138.617
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE races.date = '1986-10-26'
  AND circuits.name = 'Adelaide Street Circuit'
  AND circuits.location = 'Adelaide'
  AND circuits.lng <= 138.617

records.question: Which races took place in Argentina where qualifying numbers were at most 10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceid = qualifying.raceid
WHERE circuits.country = 'Argentina' AND qualifying.number <= 10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN qualifying ON races.raceId = qualifying.raceId
WHERE circuits.country = 'Argentina'
GROUP BY races.raceId
HAVING MAX(qualifying.number) <= 10

records.question: Which races took place at the Hockenheimring in Hockenheim where the driver had exactly 18.0 points and at most 1 win, finished in position 10, and the result status was at least 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN results ON races.raceid = results.raceid
JOIN driverstandings ON races.raceid = driverstandings.raceid
WHERE results.statusid >= 11 AND circuits.location = 'Hockenheim' AND driverstandings.points = 18.0 AND driverstandings.wins <= 1 AND results.position = '10' AND circuits.name = 'Hockenheimring'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId
JOIN driverStandings ON races.raceId = driverStandings.raceId AND results.driverId = driverStandings.driverId
WHERE circuits.name = 'Hockenheimring'
  AND circuits.location = 'Hockenheim'
  AND driverStandings.points = 18.0
  AND driverStandings.wins <= 1
  AND results.positionOrder = 10
  AND results.statusId >= 11

records.question: Which races have related circuits with longitude exactly 4.89913 and also have related constructorstandings and constructorresults records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings ON races.raceid = constructorstandings.raceid
JOIN constructorresults ON races.raceid = constructorresults.raceid
WHERE circuits.lng = 4.89913
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
WHERE circuits.lng = 4.89913
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM constructorStandings cs WHERE cs.raceId = races.raceId
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM constructorResults cr WHERE cr.raceId = races.raceId
)

records.question: Which Spanish Grand Prix races held in Barcelona up to 1973 had a constructor in exactly 4th position with 9.0 points and at most 0 wins?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
JOIN constructorstandings ON races.raceid = constructorstandings.raceid
WHERE constructorstandings.wins <= 0 AND constructorstandings.position = 4 AND races.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND constructorstandings.points = 9.0 AND circuits.location = 'Barcelona' AND races.year <= 1973
records.pred_sql:
SELECT races.raceId
FROM races
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN constructorStandings ON races.raceId = constructorStandings.raceId
WHERE circuits.name LIKE '%Barcelona%'
  AND races.name LIKE '%Spanish Grand Prix%'
  AND races.year <= 1973
  AND constructorStandings.position = 4
  AND constructorStandings.points = 9.0
  AND constructorStandings.wins <= 0
GROUP BY races.raceId
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN constructorStandings.position = 4 AND constructorStandings.points = 9.0 AND constructorStandings.wins <= 0 THEN 1 END) = 1
